  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

AutOs V0.6

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 747
Recv ID: 767
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 58
Func Name: Navigation

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "40",
    "supplier": "000",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

    "devicedata": {},

    }
  },
